name: 2027-01-15 Filipino Empowerment TEST Platform Rule Long FB+IG
description:
A small business owner can spend an entire morning at a BIR window just to file one quarterly form.

Walang exception. Doesn't matter if you have a CPA. Doesn't matter if the form is short. The queue is the queue, and the queue is hours long.

Yes, the eFPS portal exists. Yes, online filing is technically a thing. But ask any MSME owner who has tried it for a corrected return, a switched-account adjustment, or anything beyond the simplest case. The system flags it, the system asks for a physical document, the system sends them back to the window.

That's the real cost. Not the tax itself. The compliance theatre around it.

Tama na.
